DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: warrior's resolve
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: The foundation of the warrior's path. A pawn who never falters.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: iron skin
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: Years of battle have hardened this warrior's body, reducing damage taken slightly.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: power strike
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: Focused training with heavy weapons increases melee damage output.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: bulwark
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: A walking fortress. This warrior moves slower but can barely be knocked down.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: brutal cleave
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: Each swing is a death sentence. Greatly improved melee damage at the cost of accuracy.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: marksman's eye
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: The foundation of the sharpshooter's path. Calm, patient, lethal.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: steady hand
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: Years of practice allow this shooter to aim with supernatural precision.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: armour piercer
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: Shots are placed precisely at weak points in the target's armour.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: dead-eye
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: At this level of mastery, missing is simply not an option.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.label: hunter's instinct
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassNodeDef.description: This pawn moves with purpose. Slightly faster movement speed in the field.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassDef.label: warrior
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassDef.description: A melee specialist hardened by war. Warriors focus on durability and raw combat power, delivering devastating blows while shrugging off punishment that would kill lesser soldiers.

DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassDef.label: sharpshooter
DarktideWeapons.Classes.DW_ClassDef.description: A ranged combatant who wins battles before the enemy gets close. Sharpshooters invest in pinpoint accuracy and tactical positioning over brute force.
